title: 介绍 2026 届 Vercel AI 加速器入选团队
author: Alli Pope, Caroline Ciaramitaro
content:
The next generation of AI startups is being built on Vercel.

Thousands are already deploying faster and scaling globally every day with Vercel's self-driving infrastructure, so founders can focus on building products, not the infrastructure underneath them.

We're building the AI infrastructure stack from the ground up, and the Vercel AI Accelerator is our commitment to the founders shaping what’s next. This year, we've chosen 39 early-stage teams from across the US, Europe, Asia, and Latin America to collaborate with us for six weeks.

They're building AI products across every industry, at varying points in the early-stage journey. What they share is a clear point of view on what needs to exist right now and the urgency to ship it.

Teams in the program get access to Vercel's infrastructure, over $8M+ in partner credits (AWS, Anthropic, OpenAI, Cartesia, ElevenLabs, and more), weekly sessions with founders and technical leaders, and dedicated VC mentors.

Meet the founders building what comes next.

Alloy — Founder: Joe Harris

Alloy Robotics turns terabytes of robot data into instant debugging, analysis, and reporting.

Archival Memory — Founders: Pablo Diaz-Granados, Jay Katyan, Griffin Ogura

Archival reveals how teams are actually using AI. With workflow-level visibility and analytics, leaders can improve AI adoption and ROI.

Ares Technology — Founder: Tony Hunter

Ares is your Revenue Command Center: one surface to find, engage, close, and grow revenue, powered by agents that work across your customer data.

Carbyn AI — Founders: Jungkeun Hong (CEO), Tim Phuan (CTO)

Carbyn AI is Claude Code for machinists — AI glasses that capture tribal knowledge and coach operators in real time.

Cloudglue — Founders: Amy Xiao, Kevin Dela Rosa

Cloudglue is the context layer for video, enabling users, AI agents, and applications to understand and work across video at scale.

CodeYam — Founders: Nadia Eldeib, Jared Cosulich

CodeYam introduces simulations to create a powerful AI-native software development experience.

Coreviz — Founder: Wassim Gharbi

An AI-native media workspace that understands, organizes, and edits your organization's photos and videos with AI.

Grid58 — Founders: Mani HK, Sures Kumar TS

Grid58 is the operating system for making software — enabling you to understand what to build, research, design, and then finally code.

Hacktron AI — Founders: Zayne Zhang, Mohan Pedhapati, Harsh Jaiswal

Hacktron is your AI teammate for security. As AI accelerates the speed and amount of code generated in the world, the number of vulnerabilities is also exploding. Hacktron integrates into your agentic software development lifecycle to find and remediate real, exploitable vulnerabilities.

HiveBase — Founders: Nick Bae, Tim Tong

HiveBase syncs your Linear, Notion, Slack, and CRM into one living company brain — then actually runs your ops across product, eng, and GTM.

Hotfix — Founders: Sam Forrester, Evan Eissler, Jack Neil

Hotfix is an AI production operator that connects to your codebase and cloud infrastructure to fix issues as they happen.

Integrated Reasoning — Founder: David Cox

Integrated Reasoning is building ARROW — the world's first wafer-scale solver for mixed integer linear programming.

Judea — Founder: Maggie Chen

Judea is an autonomous agent that continuously optimizes your product on autopilot. Simply define your target metric, and Judea handles the rest.

Kinect — Founders: Kratik Agrawal, Varun Kandula

Kinect is building dynamic storefronts for human and agent customers — an intelligent AI brand layer that adapts to each visitor.

Kuvia — Founders: Martina Belluomini, Ana Gorodisch

Kuvia develops AI for digital pathology to detect cancer biomarkers and expand access to precision cancer care.

Lane — Founders: Jack Clark, Jorge Armenta

Lane is payments and commerce infrastructure for the agentic web — giving AI agents the ability to buy on your behalf and sellers a way to reach them.

Mighty — Founders: Johnny Hung, Munam Wasi

Mighty stops AI-powered fraud before it happens. Our security gateway protects AI agents across text, images, and documents in real time.

Milq — Founders: Juan Djuwadi, Neel Makhecha

Milq is Lovable for iOS — a delightful Mac app for building Swift applications.

Niyam AI — Founders: Samarth Shyam, Agrim Singh

Niyam AI is building the control plane for hardware manufacturing.

Nura — Founder: Usman Ahmed

Nura is the AI copilot for real estate development, automating zoning, feasibility, and pro forma analysis.

OpenVet — Founder: Adam Sager

OpenVet is an AI hospital for every animal on earth, advancing veterinary medicine with the first outcome-based biological dataset across all species.

Orchestra Research — Founders: Zechen Zhang, Amber Jiachen Liu

Orchestra Research is building the Jarvis for Science and democratizing science for everyone.

Pai — Founders: Gigi Grimes, Everhett Grimes

Pai builds digital twins of your real customers so you can test products, ads, and messaging in minutes.

Partly — Founders: Shivani Bajaj, Shantanu Prakash

Partly is building the data intelligence layer for agent-assisted hardware commerce.

Penelope Health — Founders: Sohum Patel, Mattijs De Paepe

Penelope is the API and MCP layer for US medical payments — building the largest corpus of payer policies to reduce medical claim denials.

ProxieLabs — Founders: Alex Junod, Cristian Besliu

ProxieLabs replaces slow, expensive market research with AI-powered conjoint analysis — delivering validated consumer preference data in minutes.

Rex — Founders: Merlin Kafka, Lewis Blackwood

Rex is an AI platform for operational finance work. Rex unifies customer context across finance systems so agents can run AR processes end to end.

Roots — Founders: Lauren Self, David Golovin

Roots offers the easiest way to buy and sell homes. Buyers save $100s to $1000s monthly, while sellers net $1000s more at closing.

Sentia Labs — Founders: Akshay Murthy, Sarthak Gupta, Advait Kushe

Sentia is building the always-on UX insights engine for product teams.

Smithery — Founders: Henry Mao, Anirudh Kamath

Smithery is building the connectivity infrastructure to enable the agent economy.

Takeoff — Founder: Brad Bitler

Takeoff is an AI travel platform that helps consumers plan better trips and helps hotels and travel brands reach them at the moment of discovery.

Truli — Founders: Catherine Zhou, Michael Wu

Truli builds AI agents that help food, supplement, and beverage brands stay compliant.

Vakoi AI — Founders: Ao Fu, Gagan Devagiri

Vakoi AI delivers customized immersive ads in video games at scale.

Cuak — Founders: Jihyun Kim, Cashel Fitzgerald

Cuak is a computer-use agent that handles sales and application support for enterprise: 24/7, global, and grounded in your SOPs.

What's next

On March 18th, we're bringing the cohort together with the entire Vercel ecosystem for Builder Day at our new San Francisco headquarters. The day will include a fireside chat with Guillermo Rauch (Vercel CEO) and Stephen Haney (Paper CEO), as well as office hours with our accelerator partners.

From there, teams will have four weeks to refine and ship, leading up to Demo Day on April 16th in San Francisco.

Each team presents what they've built to AI leaders, VCs, and builders. Judges will select three winners to receive over $100K in credits and prizes from Vercel and our partners, and the first-place team will receive an investment from Vercel Ventures.

Past accelerator teams like Stably AI, Cervo, and Bear AI have gone on to raise venture rounds, land enterprise customers, and form partnerships through connections made during the program. We can't wait to see what this cohort ships.

Read more
aiSummary: Vercel 宣布了其 2026 届 AI 加速器入选团队，该团队由 39 家早期初创公司组成，涵盖机器人、医疗健康和开发者工具等多个领域，并获得超过 800 万美元的合作伙伴积分支持。
oneSentenceSummary: Vercel 宣布了其 2026 届 AI 加速器入选团队，该团队由 39 家早期初创公司组成，涵盖机器人、医疗健康和开发者工具等多个领域，并获得超过 800 万美元的合作伙伴积分支持。
summary: Vercel 公布了其 2026 届 AI 加速器计划入选的 39 家初创公司。这些来自美国、欧洲、亚洲和拉丁美洲的早期团队将参加为期六周的计划，专注于利用 Vercel 的基础设施扩展 AI 产品。参与者将获得来自 AWS、Anthropic 和 OpenAI 等合作伙伴提供的超过 800 万美元积分，以及行业领导者和风险投资人 (VC) 的指导。本届入选团队突出显示了智能体工作流、专业垂直领域 AI（例如数字病理学、建筑和食品合规）以及 AI 原生开发者工具等新兴趋势。该计划将于 4 月 16 日举行演示日 (Demo Day)，届时优秀团队将竞争额外奖项和来自 Vercel Ventures 的投资。

mainPoints.point: Vercel 正将自己定位为下一代 AI 原生公司的核心基础设施提供商。
mainPoints.explanation: 通过提供“自动驾驶基础设施”，Vercel 旨在抽象化后端复杂性，让 AI 创始人能够专注于产品开发和快速交付。

mainPoints.point: 2026 届入选团队反映了行业向智能体网络和垂直领域 AI 应用的重大转变。
mainPoints.explanation: 像 Lane（智能体商务）和 Hacktron（安全智能体）这样的初创公司表明，行业正在超越简单的 LLM 封装，转向集成到特定专业工作流中的自主系统。

mainPoints.point: 该加速器通过合作伙伴积分和指导，为早期初创公司提供了巨大的资源桥梁。
mainPoints.explanation: 凭借来自 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 等主要提供商的超过 800 万美元积分，该计划显著降低了计算密集型 AI 实验和扩展的资金门槛。

keyQuotes: 下一代 AI 初创公司正在 Vercel 上构建。
他们共同的特点是，对当前需要存在的事物有着清晰的见解，并迫切希望将其付诸实践。
Lane 是智能体网络的支付和商务基础设施——赋予 AI 智能体代表你进行购买的能力。
Vercel AI 加速器是我们对塑造未来的创始人的承诺。
